temporal_description: A close-up, slightly obscured shot shows a man in a dark suit leaning over a desk in an office. To his right, a woman with dark hair is also at her desk, looking down at her work. In the background, a wall is covered with a grid of small, framed photographs. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera is static, creating a sense of being peeking into the office space. The audio captures a brief, professional exchange in what sounds like an office environment. A man speaks in a low, slightly impatient tone, giving a direct command: "打电话" (Make a call). The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing a busy office environment. Several people are seated at their desks, working on computers. The man in the suit is now seen standing and leaning over the shoulder of a man in a light-colored shirt, who is looking at his computer screen. A woman with short, dark hair sits to the right, focused on her own work. The office is filled with desks, computers, and office supplies. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. Another man responds with a slightly weary but compliant, "行了" (Alright). The first man continues with a firm, authoritative voice, "帮我把消息发出去" (Send the message out for me). A woman in the background replies with a simple, agreeable "哦" (Oh), acknowledging the request. The shot changes to a close-up of a hand holding an old, silver flip phone. The phone's small screen displays a list of contacts under the heading "Dialled Calls." The background is out of focus, showing a blurred office environment with a cup visible. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The scene concludes with the distinct, high-pitched beeping sound of a mobile phone keypad being used to enter a number or send a message. The camera remains steady, focusing on the details of the phone and the on-screen text.
